channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Original Creator Criticizes BuzzFeed and Amazon for Using AI to Animate Cuppy Without Consent
item.description: Loryn Brantz, the creator of the viral Good Advice Cupcake character, is publicly criticizing BuzzFeed and Amazon for licensing her character for a new AI-assisted animated series called Cupcake & Fri...

item.title: Stephenville Officials Review Handling of WWII-era Explosive in Residential Area
item.description: Stephenville Mayor Bob Byrnes expressed concern after the RCMP transported a suspected Second World War-era explosive shell to a residential neighbourhood, causing distress among locals. The device, d...

item.title: Winnipeg authorities warn about high-risk sex offender living in the city
item.description: Winnipeg police have announced that Marinus Willemse, a 59-year-old convicted sex offender released from federal prison in British Columbia, is considered high risk to reoffend and is slated to reside...

item.title: Africa and Global Preparedness for Future Pandemics Needs Urgent Action
item.description: As Ebola outbreak hit middle of May 2026, WHO drop report wey show say di world still dey weak for pandemic preparedness. Di report, titled 'A World on the Edge: Priorities for a Pandemic-Resilient Fu...

item.title: Three climbers die after fall near Denali Pass on Mount McKinley in Alaska
item.description: Three climbers have died and a fourth is in critical condition following a fall near Denali Pass on Mount McKinley (Denali) in Alaska, North America’s highest peak. The incident occurred on Wednesday ...

item.title: Weak Consumer Conditions Could Shape the Fed’s Next Moves
item.description: The article argues that the U.S. economy is increasingly split between strong corporate performance and weaker household conditions. While businesses continue to post solid results, consumers and the ...

item.title: Authorities monitor rising anti-immigrant tensions as fears of violence grow in South Africa
item.description: South African authorities and civil society organisations are raising concerns over growing anti-immigrant tensions ahead of 30 June, after social media threats suggested possible mobilisation against...

item.title: US federal judge blocks attempt to rename or close Kennedy Center under Trump directive
item.description: A federal judge in Washington, D.C. has issued an injunction preventing any attempt to rename the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts after Donald Trump or to shut it down under his directi...

item.title: Maki discusses creative process of ‘Habangbuhay Pansamantala’ music video at Pink Fest
item.description: Filipino music artist Maki recently opened up about the creative journey behind his single ‘Habangbuhay Pansamantala’ and its accompanying music video during his appearance at Pink Fest. In the event,...

item.title: Johannesburg court activates suspended sentence of fake lawyer over unpaid restitution
item.description: A bogus attorney in Johannesburg, Zuko Madikane, has finally had his suspended three-year prison sentence activated after failing to pay R44,000 in court-ordered restitution to a businessman he defrau...

item.title: NBI to issue subpoena to Nancy dela Rosa amid investigation into senator’s alleged escape from custody
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) is set to issue a subpoena to Nancy Dela Rosa, wife of Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, as part of its ongoing inquiry into the circumstances surrounding the...

item.title: Man arrested after ute crashes into Mudgee police station during police send-off
item.description: A man has been arrested following a serious incident in Mudgee, New South Wales, where a utility vehicle allegedly crashed into the local police station during a police send-off event. According to re...

item.title: Yassmin Abdel-Magied reflects on identity, London life and leaving Australia behind
item.description: The article profiles writer, broadcaster and activist Yassmin Abdel-Magied as she reflects on her life in London, her career, and the personal transformation she has experienced since leaving Australi...

item.title: Enugu NDC faction conducts parallel primary, nominates Ene-Nwannaji for 2027 governorship race
item.description: A faction of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) in Enugu State has carried out a parallel governorship primary election where it selected Prof. James Ene-Nwannaji as its candidate for the 2027 gove...

item.title: Bondi Testimony Shifts Blame to Blanche Amid Epstein Files Controversy
item.description: During a House Oversight Committee session, former Attorney General Pam Bondi appeared to place responsibility for the mishandling of Jeffrey Epstein-related files on Todd Blanche, the current acting ...

item.title: Manchester driver and passenger jailed after 139mph crash killed commuter
item.description: Two men have been sentenced to lengthy prison terms after a fatal high-speed crash in Manchester that killed 50-year-old Sylvester Abayomi. The collision happened on 9 March on Kingsway when a Volkswa...

item.title: President Ramaphosa to launch national rollout of long-acting HIV prevention injection in Mpumalanga
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa is set to officially launch South Africa’s rollout of a new long-acting HIV prevention injection, Lenacapavir, in Secunda, Mpumalanga on 5 June 2026. The initiative forms par...

item.title: Truck carrying FCI rice attacked in Manipur’s Ukhrul, Bengal driver killed and police constable injured
item.description: A truck driver from West Bengal was killed and a police constable was injured after unidentified gunmen ambushed an escorted goods vehicle in Manipur’s Ukhrul district on Friday. The deceased driver, ...

item.title: Tinubu Commissions Health and Education Projects Across Nigeria, Promises Better Healthcare
item.description: On Friday, President Bola Tinubu officially commissioned a series of new health and education facilities across all six geopolitical zones to mark the third anniversary of his administration. The proj...

item.title: Tanzania and Serbia deepen cooperation in trade, investment and development talks
item.description: Tanzania and Serbia have agreed to strengthen their bilateral relations with a strong focus on economic development, trade, and investment cooperation, in addition to their existing diplomatic ties. T...
